name: Mixpanel
description: Mixpanel is a powerful product analytics platform that helps teams understand user behaviour through event-based tracking. Used by product managers and growth teams to measure retention, funnels, and feature adoption.
cons: Can be complex to set up correctly
use_cases: Your product team tracks user behaviour with event-based analytics and needs powerful funnel and retention reports
You want to run cohort analyses to understand how different user segments behave over time
Your growth team needs self-serve analytics where non-engineers can build reports without SQL
You're a B2C or consumer app with up to 1M monthly events and want a free plan that covers core product analytics
